source_pr.title: backend: ensure engine cleanup to be executed
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #64101

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

Move cleanup code to a defer function, to call `CleanupEngine` even if the engine fails to close.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Index ingest tests could leave temporary local-backend engine/.sst files behind when an error occurs, polluting the TempDir and making subsequent runs flaky.
failure_signature: Temporary ingest engine files not cleaned up on error (leftover `.sst` files in TempDir).
root_cause_explanation: When the ingest engine close path returns early on errors/context cancellation, temporary local-backend files may not be cleaned up. Leftover files in `TempDir` can affect later tests and cause flakiness. This PR ensures cleanup runs (via defer/CleanupEngine) even on failures and adds a regression test that injects an error in mergeSSTs and asserts `.sst` files are removed.
fix_pattern: Ensure CleanupEngine runs via defer even on failures so temp `.sst`/engine files are removed; add a regression test with injected mergeSSTs error.

Changed files (5): pkg/ddl/ingest/engine.go, pkg/ddl/ingest/engine_mgr.go, pkg/lightning/backend/local/engine.go, tests/realtikvtest/addindextest3/BUILD.bazel, tests/realtikvtest/addindextest3/ingest_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
